Petter Reijalt

PhD Student Computer Vision @ TU Delft

p.j.w.reijalt@tudelft.nl

scholar / github / linkedin

About. My name is Petter. I am a first-year PhD-student in Computer Vision at TU Delft. My previous work focused on optical flow. My future work will focus on using camera priors (e.g. depth, surface normals) to create more data-efficient foundation models.

Publications. Publications made in the field of Computer Vision during my PhD under the supervision of Jan van Gemert.

On the Real-World Generalisability of Optical Flow Models
Accepted @ ECCV 2026
Petter Reijalt, Sander Gielisse, Rickard Karlsson, Jan van Gemert
arXiv, code
